metadata.description: Token-efficient workflow stack for Claude Code. Hub + MCP plugins + bundled skill plugins.

plugins.name: stack
plugins.description: Entry point. Bundles routing, setup, maintenance docs as skills. Install first.

plugins.name: git-fs
plugins.description: Per-session virtual filesystem with branch isolation. Auto-downloads binary, auto-inits projects.

plugins.name: vicky
plugins.description: Demand-driven research KB. Auto-enrich on gap. Drives Obsidian + Dataview.

plugins.name: context7
plugins.description: Library/SDK/framework docs, versioned and current (Context7 MCP).

plugins.name: pdf-reader
plugins.description: PDF text + image + metadata extraction via @sylphx/pdf-reader-mcp.

plugins.name: context-mode
plugins.description: Sandbox raw tool output, FTS search over commands. Keeps context lean.
